svg.title: Phase 2 — Relocation Planning Workflow
svg.desc: Shows how customer profile from Phase 1 flows through AI-driven task generation, resource allocation, timeline creation, and risk assessment before ops executive approval

text.style: fill:rgb(11,11,11); font-family:'Anthropic Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500

fill:rgb(83,74,183); font-family:'Anthropic Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:400
